attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL)

FROM

 select XXCCP_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER
 minus
 select XXCCP_HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.XXCCP_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME
